channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Mike Jeffries, former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO, arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Michael Jeffries and two other men have been arrested on sex trafficking and interstate prostitution charges, a spokesperson for federal prosecutors said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New campus protest rules spur an outcry from college faculty
item.description: Dissent is thriving this fall at American colleges, and not just among student activists. With student protests limited by new restrictions, faculty have taken up the cause. To faculty, new protest rules threaten freedom of speech — and the freedom to think, both central to university life.
item.dc:creator: ANNIE MA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Right whale population grows 4% but extinction remains a threat
item.description: BOOTHBAY HARBOR, Maine (AP) — One of the rarest species of whale in the world has increased slightly in population, encouraging conservationists to call on the federal government and the shipping and fishing industries to do more to bring the giant animals back from the brink of extinction.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bullets fly at Detroit apartment complex as two shot, one fatally, in drive-by shooting
item.description: A drive-by shooting on the east side of Detroit on Monday claimed the life of an 18-year-old, while also injuring a 19-year-old who was taken to the hospital in stable condition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas man whose execution was halted doesn't appear at state Capitol after subpoena
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — A Texas man whose execution was halted and then called to testify at the state Capitol did not show up Monday over growing pushback from state leaders who have blasted lawmakers' last-ditch tactics to subpoena Robert Roberson and spare his life for now.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Eyewitness video captures frantic efforts to save lives after deadly collapse of dock walkway
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — The metal gangway where dozens of people waited to board a ferry boat made a loud, creaking noise before snapping in the middle amid panicked cries from those sent plunging into the water.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas homicide suspect became obsessed with coworker, murdered her over her 'long' work breaks, police say
item.description: Travis Merrill, 51, has been charged him homicide after he allegedly shot Tamhara Collazo at her desk. He told police he was obsessed with her and was angry at breaks she took.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McDonald's says it doesn't endorse political candidates after Trump visit
item.description: McDonald's is emphasizing its political neutrality after former President Donald Trump spent some time behind the counter at one of its Pennsylvania locations.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, Fox 5

item.title: Prosecutors: Ex-officer's gunshots put people in danger the night of deadly Breonna Taylor raid
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — The 10 shots Brett Hankison fired into Breonna Taylor 's apartment the night she was killed in a police raid put Taylor, her neighbors and even one of Hankison’s fellow Louisville police officers in danger, federal prosecutors argued Monday.
item.dc:creator: DYLAN LOVAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: PHOTOS: White House public tour gets makeover with 'reimagined' visitor experience
item.description: The White House public tour is getting an extreme makeover, with new digital exhibits, an expanded route and more access to rooms poised to be part of the "reimagined" experience for visitors.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Dakota woman accused of poisoning boyfriend over inheritance to serve 25 years in prison
item.description: The North Dakota woman believed to have killed her boyfriend over an inheritance will serve 25 years behind bars following her sentencing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Helicopter crash in Houston kills 4, topples radio tower, officials say
item.description: The private helicopter with four people on board, including a child, either struck a cable or the tower, Houston Police Chief J. Noe Diaz said at a news conference.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Over 1 million voters cast early ballots in North Carolina
item.description: Nearly 1.01 million North Carolinians have already voted in the November general election, state officials reported on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Helicopter crashes into radio tower in Houston, killing 4
item.description: Officials say four people aboard a tour helicopter were killed when it crashed into a radio tower in Houston and burst into flames.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How does abortion translate? Ballot measures are a challenge for interpreters
item.description: Reproductive rights measures are on the ballots in 10 states after heated debates over terminology and impact — and that’s just in English.
item.dc:creator: Michael Warren, Geoff Mulvihill And Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Full list: Meat recalled over listeria concerns shipped to nearly 200 schools
item.description: Nearly 200 schools across the country received shipments of ready-to-eat meat products that have been recalled over possible listeria contamination, according to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2 Navy aviators are declared dead after a fighter jet crashed in Washington state
item.description: Two crew members who were missing following the crash of a fighter jet in mountainous terrain in Washington state during a routine training flight have been declared dead, the U.S. Navy said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How the 2025 Social Security COLA compares to recent years
item.description: A recent survey from the Motley Fool shows 50% of retirees have considered going back to work to make ends meet.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, Fox 5

item.title: Grandma who texted stranger for Thanksgiving announces breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The Arizona grandmother who sent a text message to what she believed was her grandson’s phone number, inviting him over for Thanksgiving dinner nearly nine years ago, has announced her diagnosis of breast cancer.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, ABC 4

item.title: Singer among victims in couple's alleged Las Vegas theft spree during Super Bowl week
item.description: A married couple allegedly stole hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of valuables as Las Vegas hosted the Super Bowl, with one theft involving singer Jason Derulo.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, ABC 4

item.title: In New York, a constitutional amendment provides election fodder for the left and the right
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — Democrats pushed to get a constitutional amendment on New York's ballot because they believed it could energize liberals eager to protect abortion rights.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Juan Soto's 3-run homer in 10th sends Yankees past Guardians 5-2 and into World Series for 41st time
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Juan Soto was supposed to be the difference-maker, the one who pushed the New York Yankees back to the top. They're one step away.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Many gift-buying parents pressured to overspend this holiday season: Survey
item.description: (NerdWallet) - Holiday shopping season is upon us, and the pressure is on, or at least it feels that way for some parents.
item.dc:creator: Erin El Issa, KRON4

item.title: Learning about God from dogs, Orthodox monks breed and train canines in upstate New York monastery
item.description: CAMBRIDGE, New York (AP) — After he and his fellow monks sang morning prayers in their church nestled in a forest, Brother Luke walked back to his residence to be greeted by a different kind of choir.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Child labor violations on the rise, problem could get worse: report
item.description: Between 2011 and 2020, the rate of injuries among workers under 18 nearly doubled, a recent report says.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, ABC 4

item.title: At least 7 dead after ferry dock gangway collapses on Georgia's Sapelo Island
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — Authorities said at least seven people were killed Saturday when part of a ferry dock collapsed on Georgia's Sapelo Island, where crowds had gathered for a fall celebration by the island's tiny Gullah-Geechee community of Black slave descendants.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: California woman slashed dog's throat, left it alive in trash: Sacramento deputies
item.description: The woman "felt her life would be easier if she only had to care for one dog and cut one of the dog’s throats," say officials.
item.dc:creator: Veronica Catlin, ABC 4

item.title: Haddonfield, Illinois: How the iconic small town of horror in the 'Halloween' franchise came to be
item.description: Haddonfield, Illinois, a fictional small town, is the setting for John Carpenter's iconic horror film "Halloween," which has become a cultural phenomenon and has inspired numerous sequels and remakes.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, ABC 4

item.title: Indiana 3-year-old scratched by monkey inside Walmart
item.description: BEDFORD, Ind. (WXIN) — A 3-year-old is recovering after being scratched by a monkey inside a central Indiana Walmart store this week. The incident reportedly occurred on Wednesday afternoon inside the Walmart Supercenter in Bedford, Indiana. Local police responded to the incident.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, ABC 4

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NYC officials envision turning Fifth Avenue into a grand boulevard
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Manhattan’s famed luxury store row Fifth Avenue is in line for a major makeover. New York City officials unveiled a plan this week to transform a central portion of the thoroughfare between Bryant Park and Central Park into a more pedestrian-centered boulevard.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mississippi couple celebrates 60 years of marriage at Chick-Fil-A
item.description: A Mississippi couple celebrated their 60th marriage anniversary at Chick-fil-A after eating lunch at the restaurant every day for the past two years.
item.dc:creator: Shay Simon, WGN 9

item.title: American Airlines flight taken out of service after suffering engine damage while taxiing
item.description: An American Airlines flight arriving in Chicago from overseas was taken out of service after it suffered damage to its engine while taxiing to the gate at O'Hare on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump microphone cuts out for 20 minutes at Detroit rally
item.description: Trump was in the midst of speaking about his tariff policy at the event on Friday, about to call it “the most beautiful word in the dictionary,” before the microphone went down. Someone handed the former president another microphone to try, but it didn’t work either.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5

item.title: Wisconsin US Senate candidates trade accusations of lying during testy debate
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Democratic U.S. Sen. Tammy Baldwin and Republican challenger Eric Hovde repeatedly accused each other of lying over the course of their closely watched Senate race during an often-testy and confrontational debate Friday.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, ABC 4
